metadata.title: Tenerife Experiences - Your Complete Guide to Tenerife
metadata.description: Discover the best experiences, beaches, excursions, restaurants and things to do in Tenerife. Book tours, find local tips and plan your perfect trip.

partners.title: Promote Your Business in Tenerife
partners.subtitle: Reach thousands of tourists visiting Tenerife every month through our multilingual travel platform
partners.featuredSubtitle: Trusted businesses recommended by Tenerife Experiences
partners.ctaQuestion: Want to promote your business to thousands of tourists?
partners.choosePlanSubtitle: Flexible options for every business size
partners.whyPartnerSubtitle: Join the leading travel platform for Tenerife and grow your business
partners.benefit1Desc: Your business is shown to tourists actively planning their Tenerife trip, delivering highly qualified leads.
partners.benefit2Desc: Track views, clicks, and conversions with our comprehensive dashboard. Understand your ROI.
partners.benefit3Desc: Premium partners get featured on our social media channels, reaching an even wider audience.
partners.testimonialsSubtitle: Hear from businesses already growing with us
partners.testimonial1: Since joining Tenerife Experiences, we've seen a 40% increase in international reservations. The platform really reaches the right audience.
partners.testimonial2: The analytics dashboard helps us understand exactly where our customers come from. Best marketing investment we've made.
partners.testimonial3: Being featured as a premium partner has significantly boosted our visibility. The team is professional and responsive.
partners.contactSubtitle: Tell us about your business and we'll find the perfect plan for you
partners.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your business and what you're looking for...

footer.aboutText: Your comprehensive guide to everything Tenerife has to offer. From stunning beaches to volcanic landscapes, we help you discover the best of the island.
